reasoning: Escin (aescin) is a complex mixture of triterpenoid saponins derived from horse chestnut (Aesculus hippocastanum), consisting of a pentacyclic triterpene aglycone (protoaescigenin or barringtogenol C) linked to oligosaccharide chains and acyl groups, classifying it as a triterpene saponin within the lipid/steroid-terpenoid hierarchy.
